title: Maintain the spend-category catalogue
description: Create and maintain a flat shared catalogue of spend categories. Implements G3 and UC-LEDGER-008 under A10 and A13.
rationale: A durable cross-account category identity is required before assignments and later budgets can reconcile.
story_so_that: the same spend meanings are used across every account
acceptance_criteria: Given a valid unique category name, when the owner creates a category, then the Ledger returns one active category with a stable identifier.
Given an existing category, when the owner renames it, then its stable identifier and historical transaction assignments remain unchanged.
Given a category referenced by transactions, when the owner archives it, then historical assignments remain queryable and no existing transaction fact is rewritten.
Given an archived category, when a new assignment or correction targets it, then the Ledger rejects the request before mutation until the category is reactivated.
Given an archived category, when the owner reactivates it, then the same stable category identifier becomes active and may receive new assignments and corrections.
